# Soseki App

Soseki is an all-in-one business operating platform designed for freelancers, consultants, and small agencies. It magically simplifies business operations by providing a single workspace for managing clients, projects, invoices, payments, and expenses.

## Core Features
- Client Management (CRM)
- Project & Task Tracking
- Invoicing & Payments
- Expense Management
- Waitlist & Beta Access

## Target Audience
Freelancers, independent consultants, and small agency owners who want to set up their business operations quickly (in 10 minutes) and get back to building.

## Legal & Compliance
Soseki provides enterprise-grade security and full compliance with EEA regulations through Google Consent Mode V2.

- [Privacy Policy](https://soseki.app/privacy-policy)
- [Terms of Service](https://soseki.app/terms)
- [Data Handling](https://soseki.app/my-data)

## Organization
The platform is open-source (under the MIT license) and allows users to quickly manage multiple clients and projects seamlessly.

- [Homepage](https://soseki.app)
- [Contact](https://soseki.app/contact)
